'''Jer'N Weapons Systems''', also known as '''Jer'N be' Milad Vel''', was a weapons manufacturer located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]]. It was owned by [[j'ber Jer'N]] and produced weapons such as the [[Lightning gun (Goroth Prime)|lightning gun]] and the [[Hammer (slugthrower)|Hammer]] [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]].
